# HPD.ML.Core.ShuffledDataHandle

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Randomized row ordering. Materializes on first access (must know all rows to shuffle).

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ShuffledDataHandle : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IDataHandle
```
